Label: N/A
Issue: does not include a section on user interface design
Correction: The system shall provide a user-friendly interface with intuitive navigation, consistent layout, and responsive design for various devices.

Issue: does not specify the type of home computer required for the DH home web server
Correction: The DH home web server shall be hosted on a home computer running at least Windows 10, macOS 10.15, or a Linux distribution with kernel version 5.4 or higher.

Issue: does not specify the type of contact sensors and alarms
Correction: The DigitalHome security system shall use magnetic contact sensors and piezoelectric sound alarms.

Issue: does not specify the time required for system recovery
Correction: The system recovery mechanism shall restore system data within 5 minutes of a failure.

Issue: does not include safety measures of children or disabled individuals
Correction: The system shall provide child safety locks and alerts for appliances to prevent accidental activation.

Issue: does not specify the encryption algorithm to be used
Correction: The DigitalHome web system shall use AES-256 encryption for securing user data.

Issue: does not detail  user privacy and data ownership.
Correction: Users shall retain ownership of their data, and the system shall provide options to export or delete their data upon request.

Issue: Does not specify the process for adding a user account
Correction: The system shall provide a user-friendly interface for the Master User to add new user accounts, including fields for username, password, and user role.

Label: 3.4.2.a.iv
Issue: Does not specify the backup frequency for user account information
Correction: The system shall perform a daily backup of user account information, user plans, and the home database.

Issue: Does not specify the types of small appliances that can be controlled
Correction: The system shall allow control of small appliances such as coffee makers, lamps, and fans.

Label: 4.2.1.b
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the temperature is set outside the specified range
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to set the thermostat temperature outside the range of 60°F to 80°F.

Label: 4.3.1.b
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the humidity level is set outside the specified range
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to set the humidity level outside the range of 30% to 60%.

Issue: Does not specify the duration for which the alarm will be activated
Correction: The system shall activate the alarm for a duration of 5 minutes when a security breach occurs.

Label: Glossary
Issue: does not define ISP
does not fulfill the template of four elements
lacks a password entry for the login
Correction: Log in to an account shall require entry of an account name and a password.

Issue: does not specify the reliability criteria
Correction: ... reliable with no more than 1 failure per 10,000 hours of operation

Issue: does not specify the proximity accurately
Correction: An environmental sensor or controller device shall have to be within 1000 feet of the master control device, in order to be in communication with the system.
